title: Finance Executive, Fixed Assets - WEST #HDT (PERM)
description:
• Supervises a team of three staff.
  • Review and ensure transaction postings, such as addition, disposal, transfer, write-off, exchange and journal entries, compliance with Singapore Financial Reporting standards (FRS) & Institutions Finance Group policies.
  • Monitor Assets under Construction / FA clearing open items schedule, ensuring staff have performed follow-up actions and post asset capitalisation timely.
  • Monthly, review fixed asset, deferred income and right-of-use audit schedules by the timeline agreed with PHIs.
  • Review fixed asset verification returns ensuring staff have completed necessary follow-up actions and report to PHIs’ Finance upon closure.
  • Liaise with internal / external stakeholders and auditors on Fixed Asset related matters
  • Provide staff training; give performance feedback and coaching to staff to achieve corporate KPIs.
  • Review work processes to improve efficiency and to strengthen internal control procedures
  • Any ad-hoc duties as assigned.

Requirements

  • Degree in Accountancy or ACCA
  • Minimum 3 years of relevant working experience in Accounting & Finance with at least 1-year experience in a supervisory position
  • Experience in SAP is preferred
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office
  • Independent, self-driven and meticulous.
  • Customer-service oriented with strong interpersonal and communication skills.

For interested candidate, please email your resumes to denyse.tan@recruitexpress.com.sg


Denyse Nicole Tan Shuqin (#HDT)

Recruit Express Pte Ltd

CEI No: R1333503

Company EA license : 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
